pageHeader.label: Book
pageHeader.title: Reserve Your Stay
pageHeader.description: Book directly with us and enjoy a 15% discount compared to Airbnb.

bookingForm.title: Request a Booking
bookingForm.subtitle: Fill in the form below and we'll get back to you with availability and pricing within 24 hours.

direct.title: Direct Booking — Save 15%
direct.text: For the best rates, book directly with us via this form or by emailing villavolpeorta@gmail.com. You'll enjoy a special 15% discount off the Airbnb price.

airbnb.title: Via Airbnb
airbnb.text: Prefer the convenience of Airbnb? Book on Airbnb for the security and support of the platform.

policies.title: Deposit
policies.text: 30% of total price to confirm booking.

policies.title: Cancellation
policies.text: Full refund if cancelled 21+ days before arrival. After that, deposit is non-refundable.

policies.title: Tourist Tax
policies.text: €1.00 per night per guest, as required by law.

policies.title: Pets
policies.text: Small pets welcome. €120 additional cleaning fee per stay.

policies.title: ID Required
policies.text: Valid identification for registration with local authorities.

policies.title: No Parties
policies.text: Villa Volpe is an oasis of relaxation. No parties or events.
